description_long: This nightstand features a square, light wood tabletop with rounded edges, supported by a painted white base. The front side displays two small drawers, each with a round, dark metal knob, and decorative paneling. Four turned wooden legs connect the tabletop to a solid lower shelf, which provides additional storage or display space. The sides and back are plain, with the same painted finish and no visible hardware or openings. The overall design is classic and functional, with subtle decorative touches on the drawer fronts and legs. The nightstand is compact, making it suitable for placement in tight spaces or alongside other furniture.
description: A compact nightstand with a light wood top, white painted body, two small drawers with round knobs, and turned legs over a solid lower shelf.
description_view_0: Front view showing two small drawers with round knobs and decorative paneling, as well as the turned legs and lower shelf.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain painted side panel, rounded tabletop edge, and the profile of the turned legs and lower shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back panel and the structure of the legs and shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a clear look at the side panel and leg design.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
